title: Faisal Islam: Six things we now know about the UK economy in charts
snippet: The UK economy is showing resilience – it’s worth diving into the data in more detail to understand why.

title: Play-off final may be delayed by Spygate hearing
snippet: The Championship play-off final may not go ahead on Saturday 23 May as the EFL investigates the Spygate scandal surrounding finalists Southampton.

title: Trump's Fed chair pick Kevin Warsh confirmed by US Senate
snippet: Kevin Warsh was confirmed by the narrowest margin since the role required a Senate confirmation vote.

title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.

title: Is this actually what Anne Boleyn looked like?
snippet: An algorithm has suggested images of what were thought to be Anne Boleyn might not be.

title: War criminal Ratko Mladić's jail release request denied
snippet: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.

title: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
snippet: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.

title: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
snippet: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.

title: 'We're right on track,' says Streeting as key target for hospital waiting times hit
snippet: Government his its interim target of 65% of patients in England being treated within 18 weeks.

title: Giant new dinosaur identified from fossils in Thailand
snippet: The nagatitan is the largest dinosaur found in South-East Asia and weighs as much as nine elephants.

title: Latvian PM resigns after row over stray Ukrainian drones
snippet: Drones bound for Russia crashed down in Latvia last week, prompting a political fallout.

title: Sydney dentist's patients warned of viruses including HIV
snippet: Authorities urged patients to get tested due to "poor infection control practices" at the Australian clinic.

title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain
snippet: The leaders of the world's two superpowers were all smiles for the cameras during the US president's visit to Beijing.

title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
snippet: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

title: White-tailed eagles to be released in Exmoor despite farmer warnings
snippet: Some farmers fear the reintroduction of the UK's biggest bird of prey will threaten their livestock.
